name: baileywickham
description: Bailey Wickham's Claude Code plugins — CLIs with skills that teach Claude to drive them.

plugins.name: unifi-cli
plugins.description: Answer questions about your UniFi network (gateway, APs, connected clients) by driving the unifi CLI against the local gateway's Integrations API.

plugins.name: ibkr-options
plugins.description: Research and trade options and stocks on Interactive Brokers via a local CLI — chains, quotes, Greeks, and limit orders with a preview/confirm/execute safety protocol. Requires IB Gateway.
